title: Piquant German Potatoes Bake
description: A savory German dish featuring umami flavors and a snappy texture, perfect for a energizing meal, this dairy-free-friendly recipe combines the richness of potatoes with the tanginess of red wine vinegar, all wood-fired-baked to perfection.
instructions: Preheat the wood-fired oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the red wine vinegar, olive oil, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sliced red potatoes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and arrange the potato slices in a single layer.
Dot the top of the potatoes with the vegan butter.
Bake the potatoes in the preheated wood-fired oven for 30 minutes, or until they are tender and golden brown.
Remove the potatoes from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
Return the potatoes to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until the parsley is crispy.
Remove the potatoes from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
